field.name: help
field.p: Esta vista muestra los despachos que reemplazan las salidas a matadero.

sheet.style: max-width: 100% !important; width: 100% !important; background-color: #1a1924 !important; color: #ffffff; min-height: 100vh; padding: 24px; margin: 0 !important;

div.class: row row-cols-1 row-cols-sm-2 row-cols-md-3 row-cols-lg-4 g-4

a.class: btn btn-link text-white-50 p-0 text-decoration-none small style-hover
btn btn-link text-white-50 p-0 text-decoration-none small
btn btn-link text-white-50 p-0 text-decoration-none small
btn btn-link text-white-50 p-0 text-decoration-none small
btn btn-link text-white-50 p-0 text-decoration-none small
btn btn-link text-white-50 p-0 text-decoration-none small
btn btn-link text-white-50 p-0 text-decoration-none small
btn btn-link text-white-50 p-0 text-decoration-none small
